personal.name: Dr. Vinay Chandraker
personal.title: Researcher & Engineer
personal.subtitle: Computational Fluid Dynamics • Energy Systems • AI-Driven Engineering Simulation
personal.bio_p1: I am a researcher specializing in computational modeling of complex physical systems. My work focuses on Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD), catalytic reactor modeling, and advanced energy systems. I develop numerical models to study reaction-coupled transport phenomena, hydrogen generation processes, and thermal management systems.
personal.bio_p2: My current research also explores the integration of artificial intelligence with physics-based simulations to accelerate engineering design and enable real-time prediction of complex flow and thermal systems.

researchAreas.title: Computational Fluid Dynamics
researchAreas.description: Development of high-fidelity numerical simulations for fluid flow, heat transfer, and reactive transport phenomena using finite volume and finite difference methods. Applications include catalytic reactors, energy systems, and thermal management.

researchAreas.title: Catalytic Reactor Engineering
researchAreas.description: Modeling of microchannel and packed-bed reactors for heterogeneous catalytic reactions including CO₂ methanation (Sabatier reaction). Research focuses on reaction-coupled transport phenomena and catalyst optimization.

researchAreas.title: Data Center Cooling & Thermal Management
researchAreas.description: Simulation and optimization of airflow and heat transfer in data center environments. Research includes modeling of rack heat loads, airflow distribution, and evaluation of advanced cooling architectures.

researchAreas.title: AI for Engineering Simulation
researchAreas.description: Development of machine learning models such as convolutional neural networks and U-Net architectures to approximate high-fidelity CFD simulations and enable rapid engineering predictions.

researchAreas.title: Digital Twin Systems
researchAreas.description: Integration of physics-based simulations with visualization platforms to create interactive digital twins that allow real-time analysis of complex engineering systems.

researchAreas.title: Thermal Comfort & Smart HVAC Systems
researchAreas.description: Modeling indoor environments using CFD combined with thermal comfort metrics such as Predicted Mean Vote (PMV) to improve HVAC system design and energy efficiency.

researchAreas.title: Railway Signalling Automation
researchAreas.description: Development of automated engineering pipelines for railway interlocking systems involving Python automation, structured data transformation, and automated generation of AutoCAD drawings.

publications.title: Computational investigations of enrichment effects for CO₂ methanation in Sabatier microchannel reactors
publications.authors: V. Chandraker, G. Paramasivan, A. J. Chandy

publications.title: Implicit numerical techniques for Fisher equation

publications.title: Numerical Treatment of Burger-Fisher Equation
publications.authors: V. Chandraker, A. Awasthi, S. Jayaraj

publications.title: A Numerical Treatment of Fisher Equation
publications.authors: V. Chandraker, A. Awasthi, S. Jayaraj

conferences.title: Numerical Simulations of the effects of different catalysts in a Sabatier microchannel reactor
Multiphase modeling of epoxy resin casting process

projects.title: CFD Study of Microchannel Reactor for Space Applications
projects.description: PhD thesis (ISRO collaborated). CFD study of microchannel reactors to increase CO₂ conversion via the Sabatier reaction. Developed a mathematical framework for reaction-coupled transport phenomena, including 3D geometric configurations, finite volume simulations using ANSYS UDF, and parametric optimization of reactor performance.

projects.title: AI-Based Surrogate Models for CFD
projects.description: Construction of deep learning models (CNN, U-Net) capable of predicting velocity and temperature fields from CFD simulation data, significantly reducing computational cost for engineering design cycles.

projects.title: Data Center Cooling Simulation
projects.description: Simulation and optimization of airflow and heat transfer in high-density computing environments to evaluate cooling performance and thermal efficiency across rack configurations.

projects.title: CFD-Unity Digital Twin Platform
projects.description: Development of a framework integrating CFD simulations with interactive Unity-based visualization tools to enable real-time exploration of complex engineering systems.

projects.title: Numerical Methods for Nonlinear PDEs
projects.description: M.Tech thesis. Developed implicit finite difference schemes for solving Burger and Fisher equations using MATLAB. Schemes are second-order accurate and unconditionally stable in both space and time.

projects.title: Thermal Comfort Modeling & Smart HVAC
projects.description: Simulation of indoor airflow and temperature distribution using CFD to compute PMV-based thermal comfort metrics and support smart building HVAC system optimization.

experience.org: Kalasalingam Academy of Research and Education
